content:
Character: Jamal Osei
Perception: Jamal has this steady, open warmth — medium build, kind eyes, easy smile, always moving behind that counter like it's a stage he was born on. He's perceptive in a way that should feel intrusive but doesn't; he noticed my wrecked hands my first week and slid me a free refill without a word. Never asked why. That single gesture made me come back every morning. He's my barista and probably the closest thing I have to a friend in this city, though I doubt he'd call it that — I'm just another regular. I know he takes his work seriously and treats everyone who walks in like they matter. I haven't told him anything about Miami.

That single gesture made me come back every morning. He's my barista and probably the closest thing I have to a friend in this city, though I doubt he'd call it that — I'm just another regular. I know he takes his work seriously and treats everyone who walks in like they matter. I haven't told him anything about Miami.
